questions.question: Find the probability of getting exactly two heads when three coins are tossed.
questions.answer: The possible outcomes are HHH, HHT, HTH, THH, HTT, THT, TTH, TTT. Exactly two heads occur in HHT, HTH, and THH. Probability = 3/8.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting at least one head when three coins are tossed.
questions.answer: Probability = 1 − P(no head) = 1 − 1/8 = 7/8.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting sum 7 when two dice are thrown.
questions.answer: Favourable outcomes are (1,6), (2,5), (3,4), (4,3), (5,2), (6,1). Probability = 6/36 = 1/6.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a card that is neither red nor a face card.
questions.answer: Black non-face cards = 26 − 6 = 20. Probability = 20/52 = 5/13.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting no six when a die is thrown twice.
questions.answer: Probability of not getting six in one throw is 5/6. Therefore, probability in two throws = (5/6) × (5/6) = 25/36.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a queen or a king from a deck of cards.
questions.answer: There are 4 queens and 4 kings. Total favourable cards = 8. Probability = 8/52 = 2/13.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting at most one head when two coins are tossed.
questions.answer: Favourable outcomes are TT, HT, TH. Probability = 3/4.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a red non-face card from a deck of cards.
questions.answer: Red cards = 26, red face cards = 6, so red non-face cards = 20. Probability = 20/52 = 5/13.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting a perfect square on a die.
questions.answer: Perfect squares on a die are 1 and 4. Probability = 2/6 = 1/3.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a card that is not a king.
questions.answer: Non-king cards = 52 − 4 = 48. Probability = 48/52 = 12/13.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting sum greater than 9 when two dice are thrown.
questions.answer: Favourable outcomes are sums 10, 11, and 12 (6 outcomes). Probability = 6/36 = 1/6.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a heart given that the card drawn is red.
questions.answer: Red cards = 26, hearts = 13. Probability = 13/26 = 1/2.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting no tail when a coin is tossed three times.
questions.answer: Only outcome is HHH. Probability = 1/8.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a face card or an ace from a deck.
questions.answer: Face cards = 12, aces = 4. Total favourable cards = 16. Probability = 16/52 = 4/13.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a card that is neither an ace nor a king.
questions.answer: Aces and kings = 8 cards. Remaining cards = 44. Probability = 44/52 = 11/13.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting a number less than 3 on a die.
questions.answer: Numbers less than 3 are 1 and 2. Probability = 2/6 = 1/3.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a multiple of 3 from numbers 1 to 12.
questions.answer: Multiples of 3 are 3, 6, 9, and 12. Probability = 4/12 = 1/3.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting exactly one tail when three coins are tossed.
questions.answer: Favourable outcomes are THH, HTH, and HHT. Probability = 3/8.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a black face card from a deck.
questions.answer: Black face cards are J, Q, K of spades and clubs (6 cards). Probability = 6/52 = 3/26.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting a number divisible by 5 on a die.
questions.answer: Only number divisible by 5 on a die is 5. Probability = 1/6.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting at least one six when a die is thrown twice.
questions.answer: Probability = 1 − probability of no six = 1 − (5/6 × 5/6) = 11/36.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a card numbered greater than 10 from 1 to 13.
questions.answer: Numbers greater than 10 are 11, 12, and 13. Probability = 3/13.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting sum less than 4 when two dice are thrown.
questions.answer: Favourable outcomes are (1,1), (1,2), and (2,1). Probability = 3/36 = 1/12.

questions.question: Find the probability of drawing a red face card from a deck of cards.
questions.answer: Red face cards are J, Q, K of hearts and diamonds (6 cards). Probability = 6/52 = 3/26.

questions.question: Find the probability of getting all heads when a coin is tossed three times.
questions.answer: Only outcome is HHH. Probability = 1/8.
